mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie (title, release_date, movie_cd, `rank`, rank_inten, rnum, rank_old_and_new) VALUES (#{movieNm}, #{openDt}, #{movieCd}, #{rank}, #{rankInten}, #{rnum}, #{rankOldAndNew})
mapper.select: SELECT title as movieNm, release_date as openDt, movie_cd as movieCd, `rank`, rank_inten as rankInten, rnum, rank_old_and_new as rankOldAndNew FROM movie ORDER BY CAST(`rank` AS UNSIGNED) ASC LIMIT 10
